hero.headline_html:
Building Trust,

hero.subtitle: Custom home builders in Greater Victoria since 1998. Delivering on time, on budget, with excellent quality construction and attention to detail.

Classic Cordova ocean front residence by LIDA Homes

paragraphs: At LIDA Homes, our job is building trust. Trust that your home will be completed on time and on budget, with excellent quality construction and attention to detail; one project at a time.

We've been custom home builders in Victoria since 1998, and we've earned our reputation for excellence by delivering on our promise. Led by President Dave Stephens, our team brings over 25 years of experience to every project.

Our fee is a percentage of the budgeted construction costs. We bill all labour and materials at cost, and provide detailed monthly breakdowns of project expenses — full transparency from start to finish.

contact.subtitle: Ready to bring your vision to life? Whether you're dreaming of a custom home or planning a renovation, we'd love to hear from you.

footer.description: LIDA Homes is an award-winning custom home builder serving Greater Victoria since 1998. Design, construction, and project management for discerning homeowners.
badges: Best of the City 2023 — 1st Place Custom Homes

items.title: Custom Homes
items.description: From concept to completion, we build luxury custom homes tailored to your lifestyle and the West Coast landscape.

items.title: Renovations & Additions
items.description: Thoughtful renovations and additions that transform your existing home while preserving its character.

items.title: Kitchen & Bath Remodeling
items.description: High-end kitchen and bathroom renovations with premium materials and expert craftsmanship.

items.title: Carriage Homes & Suites
items.description: Garden suites and carriage homes designed to complement your property and maximize its potential.

items.title: Multi-Family & Commercial
items.description: Multi-family residential and commercial construction with the same quality standards as our custom homes.

items.title: House Lifts
items.description: Structural house lifts to add living space, update foundations, or address flood-zone requirements.
